title: Pittsburgh Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Pittsburgh, with a Z-Score of -3.11. This event has a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Pittsburgh are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's daily activities.
 The Z-Score of -3.11 indicates that this cold snap is a rare and anomalous event, with a score of 10.0/10 indicating a critical level.
 The humidity level is at 68%, with a wind speed of 3.8 km/h, and the HDD is at 11.9 GG, while the CDD is at 0.0 GG.
conclusion: Implement emergency protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of this cold snap.
